accept_tutorial: Read the instructions and finish the tutorial
add_pink_dresses: Add two units of the women's "Pink Summer Dress" (size M) to the shopping cart
offer_green_coat: Find the free code for the women's “Green Coat” in the product images and apply it
add_green_coat: Add any units of the product "Green Coat" to the shopping cart
add_bomber_jacket: Add any units of the men's "Bomber Jacket" to your favorites and to the shopping cart
delete_item: Delete the product "Green Coat" from the shopping cart. Select it and drag it to the delete area
make_purchase: Complete the purchase and fill in the shipping information
double_button: Double tap the button to go to the final questionnaire
questionnaire: Complete the questionnaire to finish the experiment
